rulings.Case Title: MIKHAIL GORELIK VS. ARKADY GORELIK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-456736 WITH CASE CUD-06-619480
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JANUARY 11, 2007, LINE 14. DEFENDANT ARKADY GORELIK, IGOR GORELIK AND IRINA GORELIK'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-456736 WITH CASE CUD-06-619480 IS GRANTED. CASE 456736 IS THE LEAD CASE. GRANTING OF MOTION IS CONDITIONED ON THE ARKADY GORELIK PARTIES POSTING A BOND, WITHIN FOURTEEN DAYS, REFLECTING THE DAILY RENTAL VALUE, AS MEASURED BY MIKHAIL GORELIK'S MONTHLY MORTGAGE PAYMENTS PLUS ANNUAL PROPERTY TAXES. BOND TO COVER A PERIOD OF THIRTY DAYS AND TO BE INCREASED MONTHLY UNTIL THE CASES PROCEED TO TRIAL; OR IN LIEU OF A BOND TO DEPOSIT SAID SUM WITH THE COURT. =(302/PJM/PB)
